creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 152766
Makefile with CPE info added

security/krb5-112 has vulnerabilities with a CVE number (e.g. CVE-2014-9423)[0]. This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[1].

[0] http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/24ce5597-acab-11e4-a847-206a8a720317.html
[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
